Husband should prioritise his wife and wife should prioritise her husband. That is a healthy relationship. It doesnt mean that u should not respect and take care of ur parents. Wife also have parents and sibling. She leave everyone for her husband. Why cant the husband do the same. She is not a slave. She should not be abused physically or mentally in the house of her husband. She should be provided food and clothing. Yaar she is a human being. She also need love.

it's not usually happening I love your podcast but this episode is somehow a little bit misleading for those whose understanding is weak. like nonveg nahi khana cholesterol ho sakta, its actually funny aise kaju khane milk peene se bhi hoga, kaise khana kitna khana aur kis quality ka kha rahe ho that depends, Non-Veg is must for the human body. Politics powerful people chahte hai indirectly karte bhi hai ki aap vegetarian bano iske fayede hai unko, tons of benefits, and India mein full-fat milk is way more sell in comparatively skimmed or less fat milk, because of unconscious fat cravings or chlo usse bhi hoga. Yoga Meditation are very good things agar aap veganism or religion ko side pe rakhi kar pao toh, Points like 3 point batao glowing skin ke liye is not a good way I know it's for shorts) Podcast is for give prospect to people, not hacks. Do Podcasts like Americans do for ex Huberman, PBD, etc. Creating a balance in life is necessary.
